case_title: GOLDEN GATE EQUIPMENT VS APEX DEVELOPMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $896.72 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE EQUIPMENT AS TO DEFENDANT APEX DEVELOPMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
